title: Tracer orb
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Eye}}
'''Tracer orbs''', also known as '''Eyes of the Master''' by [[Ygabba Hise]] and the other children under [[Gilramos Libkath]]'s control, were tracking devices created by [[Gilramos Libkath]]. The orbs acted as miniature cameras, capable of sending detailed visual information back to Libkath. He installed them into his [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] so they wouldn't escape. If they did escape, the orbs would release a toxin into their [[Blood/Legends|blood]] stream and they would [[Death/Legends|die]]. The orbs were installed by [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droids]]. The only way to deactivate the orbs was to ensure Gilramos Libkath's death.

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: Hunted]]''
